summary: AdsGupta Core Architecture Overhaul - All 15 requested features tested and verified. Hero section no overlap at 1920px, Navigation with 'The Neural Engine' and 'The Protocols' working, MegaMenu auto-populates from protocolsConfig.js, PersistentSLMChat visible with AI badge and status indicator, About page two-card layout, Privacy page with SLM/edge focus, /amazon-audit redirect working, MARKETPLACE INTEL section correctly removed.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor ESLint warning in PersistentSLMChat.jsx line 178 - missing 'slmAvailable' in useEffect dependency array (non-blocking)
HeroSection uses Flexbox layout correctly - no text/animation overlap at 1920px verified
protocolsConfig.js properly serves as Single Source of Truth for MegaMenu protocols
SLM Chat correctly shows 'Fallback Mode' when Chrome Prompt API unavailable
context_for_next_testing_agent: Architecture overhaul complete. Navigation shows 'The Neural Engine' (links to /#features) and 'The Protocols' (triggers MegaMenu). MegaMenu dynamically populates 6 protocols from protocolsConfig.js: Amazon Audit, Walmart Audit (coming-soon), Insights Engine, DemoAI, TalentOS, Monetization. PersistentSLMChat component persists across all pages including /aboutme and /privacy. Chat uses Chrome Prompt API with fallback responses. /amazon-audit 301 redirects to demoai.adsgupta.com/amazon-audit. MarketplaceSection removed from HomePage but 'Marketplace Intel' card remains in HubSection (as navigation card to /marketplacesolutions).

2. Navigation shows 'The Neural Engine' menu item - PASS
3. Navigation shows 'The Protocols' menu item - PASS

5. Hovering 'The Protocols' shows MegaMenu - PASS

8. MegaMenu contains DemoAI protocol card - PASS
9. MegaMenu contains TalentOS protocol card - PASS

12. Persistent SLM Chat button visible in bottom-right corner - PASS

14. Clicking SLM chat opens chat window - PASS
15. Chat window positioned above sticky ad area (bottom: 80px) - PASS
16. /aboutme page shows minimalist two-card layout - PASS
17. About page Card 1: Pousali Dasgupta with Portfolio and LinkedIn buttons - PASS
18. About page Card 2: Ranjan Dasgupta with Portfolio and LinkedIn buttons - PASS
19. /privacy page loads with 'Your Data, Your Control' heading - PASS
20. Privacy page has Local SLM Processing card - PASS
21. Privacy page has Privacy-First Ad Serving card - PASS
22. Privacy page has Edge Computing Architecture card - PASS
23. /amazon-audit redirects to demoai.adsgupta.com/amazon-audit - PASS
24. Homepage does NOT show MARKETPLACE INTEL section (#marketplace) - PASS
25. SLM Chat responds in fallback mode with contextual answers - PASS

mocked_integrations.Chrome SLM (Gemini Nano): MOCKED - Falls back to preset contextual responses when Chrome Prompt API unavailable. Shows 'Fallback Mode' indicator in chat header.
mocked_integrations.Chat responses: MOCKED - Returns pre-defined responses from getFallbackResponse() function when SLM unavailable

design_review.overall: Dark theme (#121212 background) with cyan accents consistently applied
design_review.hero_section: Flexbox layout prevents text/animation overlap, animation constrained to 40% width on desktop
design_review.navigation: Brand naming update complete - 'The Neural Engine' and 'The Protocols' properly displayed
design_review.megamenu: Protocols dynamically loaded from protocolsConfig.js, proper hover states, external link indicators
design_review.slm_chat: Positioned at bottom: 80px to avoid sticky ad overlap, gradient button with AI badge and status dot
design_review.about_page: Minimalist two-card grid layout with avatar placeholders (initials), Portfolio/LinkedIn CTAs
design_review.privacy_page: Three key principle cards in grid layout, detailed sections with icons and proper hierarchy

component_verification.Navigation.jsx: Working - Shows 'The Neural Engine', 'The Protocols' with chevron, triggers MegaMenu on hover
component_verification.MegaMenu.jsx: Working - Dynamically populates from protocolsConfig.js, shows 5 live + 1 coming-soon protocols
component_verification.PersistentSLMChat.jsx: Working - Persists across pages, fallback mode active, chat interaction functional
component_verification.HeroSection.jsx: Working - Flexbox layout, no overlap at 1920px, responsive text sizing
component_verification.AboutPage.jsx: Working - Minimalist two-card layout, Portfolio/LinkedIn buttons for both founders
component_verification.PrivacyPage.jsx: Working - 'Your Data, Your Control' heading, three key principle cards
component_verification.App.js: Working - /amazon-audit redirect to demoai domain, MarketplaceSection removed from HomePage
